sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EXAMPLE_FILE_PARCEL_LINK ( FILE_MAP_ID, PARCEL_ID, PROJECT_ID, REGISTERED_AT, REGISTERED_BY ) VALUES ( #fileMapId#, #parcelId#, #projectId#, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #userId# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT L.PARCEL_ID, P.PARCEL_LABEL, P.DISPLAY_ADDRESS, P.LAND_CATEGORY_NAME, P.AREA_TEXT FROM EXAMPLE_FILE_PARCEL_LINK L, EXAMPLE_PROJECT_PARCEL_VIEW P WHERE L.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID AND L.PARCEL_ID = P.PARCEL_ID AND L.FILE_MAP_ID = #fileMapId#

SELECT P.PARCEL_ID, P.DISPLAY_ADDRESS, P.PARCEL_LABEL, P.LAND_CATEGORY_NAME, P.AREA_TEXT FROM EXAMPLE_PROJECT_PARCEL_VIEW P WHERE P.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND P.PARCEL_ID = #parcelId#
AND P.MAIN_LOT_NO = #mainLotNo#
AND P.SUB_LOT_NO = #subLotNo#
ORDER BY P.PARCEL_ID

SELECT B.PARCEL_ID, B.PARCEL_LABEL, B.DISPLAY_ADDRESS, B.LAND_CATEGORY_NAME, B.AREA_VALUE, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM EXAMPLE_FILE_PARCEL_LINK L WHERE L.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND L.PARCEL_ID = B.PARCEL_ID ) AS ADJUSTMENT_COUNT, B.GEOMETRY_WKT FROM EXAMPLE_GIS_BOUNDARY_VIEW B WHERE B.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
SELECT PARCEL_ID, COUNT(1) AS ADJUSTMENT_COUNT FROM EXAMPLE_FILE_PARCEL_LINK WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# GROUP BY PARCEL_ID
